tasks.label: Run Local MQTT Broker
args: Set-Location 'd:\Workspace\ESP32-C3\project-name\backend'; if (-not (Test-Path 'node_modules')) { npm install }; npm run start:broker

tasks.label: Run Node Game Server
args: Set-Location 'd:\Workspace\ESP32-C3\project-name\backend'; if (-not (Test-Path 'node_modules')) { npm install }; npm start

tasks.label: Upload & Monitor MicroPython
args: $esp = Get-CimInstance Win32_SerialPort | Where-Object { $_.PNPDeviceID -match 'VID_303A&PID_1001' } | Sort-Object DeviceID | Select-Object -First 1; if (-not $esp) { Write-Error 'No ESP32-C3 serial port found (VID_303A&PID_1001). Connect the board and retry.'; exit 1 }; $port = $esp.DeviceID; Write-Host "[esp] Using port $port"; $old = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -match '^python(.exe)?$' -and $_.CommandLine -match "serial.tools.miniterm $port" }; if ($old) { $old | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 300; & ampy --port $port put 'd:\Workspace\ESP32-C3\project-name\board\main.py'; & python -m serial.tools.miniterm $port 115200; exit 0

tasks.label: OTA Update Connected Gamepads (WiFi)
args: Set-Location 'd:\Workspace\ESP32-C3\project-name\backend'; if (-not (Test-Path 'node_modules')) { npm install }; npm run ota:push
